emails.subject: Re: Inception Document for GTV II phase II
emails.subject_base: Inception Document for GTV II phase II
emails.body: Re: Inception Document for GTV II phase II No this is definitely not the final document.. Issues 1-3 are correct and complete, but 4 5 are not. I imagine 6-10 pages in reporting requirements for Gas Daily Options and Pipe Options alone. While we are still working on these requirements we can move forward on 1-3 and the deal entry and new deal type for basis options. Louise Kitchen 04/08/2001 06:57 PM

emails.subject: Re: Inception Document for GTV II phase II

emails.body: Re: Inception Document for GTV II phase II No this is definitely not the final document.. Issues 1-3 are correct and complete, but 4 5 are not. I imagine 6-10 pages in reporting requirements for Gas Daily Options and Pipe Options alone. While we are still working on these requirements we can move forward on 1-3 and the deal entry and new deal type for basis options. Louise Kitchen 04/08/2001 06:57 PM
